summary.en: Compile the current TuyaOpen project via tos.py build.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 tos.py build 编译当前 TuyaOpen 项目。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user asks to build, compile, or rebuild the active project.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户要求编译、构建或重新编译当前项目时使用。

summary.en: Read or update the tuyaopen.project.ini for the active project.
summary.zh-CN: 读取或修改当前项目的 tuyaopen.project.ini。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user wants to change platform, rename, or edit project settings.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户希望更换平台、重命名或修改项目级设置时使用。

summary.en: Register a freshly-downloaded PlatformIO library with the active TuyaOpen project's build system. Reads the pinned version from the project lockfile, then patches CMakeLists.txt and Kconfig where applicable.
summary.zh-CN: 把刚下载的 PlatformIO 库正式注册到当前 TuyaOpen 项目的构建系统里。版本号从项目锁文件读取，并在必要时同步修改 CMakeLists.txt 与 Kconfig。

whenToUse.en: Use immediately after the IDE downloads a library from the Library → Ecosystem tab.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当 IDE 通过库 → 生态标签页下载新库后立即触发。

name.zh-CN: 涂鸦 IoT 平台操作

summary.en: Create products, get PID, query and configure DPs on the Tuya Developer Platform via tuya-devplat-cli.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 tuya-devplat-cli 在涂鸦开发者平台创建产品、获取 PID、查询和配置功能点（DP）。

whenToUse.en: Use when creating a Tuya product, retrieving a PID, querying or adding DPs (data points / 功能点), binding panels, releasing products, or performing any operation on the Tuya Developer Platform (iot.tuya.com).
whenToUse.zh-CN: 创建涂鸦产品、获取 PID、查询或添加功能点（DP）、绑定面板、发布产品，以及任何需要在涂鸦开发者平台（iot.tuya.com）上操作时使用。

summary.en: End-to-end IoT product development: requirements → Tuya Platform product/DP creation → complete embedded firmware. State-machine detects project state and picks up from wherever development stands.
summary.zh-CN: 端到端 IoT 产品开发：需求梳理 → 涂鸦平台建产品/DP → 完整嵌入式固件生成。状态机检测项目进度，从当前阶段继续。

whenToUse.en: Use when developer wants to build a complete IoT product from scratch, or to continue from any mid-point in the development flow.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当开发者要从零开始做 IoT 产品，或从中途继续开发时使用。

summary.en: Hardware-aware code generation for TuyaOpen embedded projects. Reads .tuyaopen/board-context.md, confirms peripheral selection, and generates TDL-layer usage code. Includes peripheral skills for display (LVGL/raw), camera, button, and LED.
summary.zh-CN: TuyaOpen 嵌入式项目的硬件感知代码生成。读取 .tuyaopen/board-context.md，确认外设选型，生成 TDL 层使用代码。包含显示屏（LVGL/原始）、摄像头、按键、指示灯等外设 skill。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user asks to initialize or drive a hardware peripheral: display, camera, IMU, LED strip, touchpad, printer, button, joystick, PMIC, or any board hardware. Also use for 'vibe coding' or any hardware-related code generation request.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户要求初始化或使用硬件外设时使用：显示屏、摄像头、IMU、LED 灯带、触摸屏、打印机、按键、摇杆、PMIC 等。也适用于 'vibe coding' 或任何硬件相关代码生成请求。

summary.en: Flash firmware, read flash, hardware reset (DTR/RTS), and authorize devices (UUID/AuthKey via UART) using tyutool_cli directly.
summary.zh-CN: 直接使用 tyutool_cli 烧录固件、读取 Flash、硬件复位（DTR/RTS）、写入设备授权码（UUID/AuthKey）。

whenToUse.en: Use when the agent needs to flash firmware, read flash memory, hardware-reset a device, or write UUID/AuthKey credentials over UART using tyutool_cli directly.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当需要直接使用 tyutool_cli 烧录固件、读取 Flash、硬件复位设备或通过 UART 写入 UUID/AuthKey 授权码时使用。

summary.en: Non-blocking background serial log capture for TuyaOpen devices. Runs tos.py monitor -l in background, writes logs to <project_dir>/.target_logging/, lets agent tail or stop at any time.
summary.zh-CN: TuyaOpen 设备非阻塞后台串口日志捕获。后台运行 tos.py monitor -l，日志写入 <project_dir>/.target_logging/，agent 可随时读取或停止。

whenToUse.en: Use when the agent needs to capture device serial logs without blocking, monitor UART output during a build-flash-analyze loop, or read device logs asynchronously.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当 AI 代理需要在不阻塞的情况下捕获设备串口日志、在编译-烧录-分析闭环中监控 UART 输出，或异步读取设备日志时使用。

summary.en: Add a new board / BSP to TuyaOpen — directory, Kconfig, drivers, and pin map.
summary.zh-CN: 为 TuyaOpen 新增开发板 / BSP：目录、Kconfig、驱动、引脚映射。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user wants to add support for a new development board or BSP (Board Support Package) to the TuyaOpen SDK — creating directories, Kconfig entries, drivers, and pin maps.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户希望为 TuyaOpen SDK 新增开发板或 BSP（板级支持包）支持时使用，包括创建目录、Kconfig 条目、驱动及引脚映射。

summary.en: Validate C/C++ formatting, file headers (@copyright required), and forbidden Chinese characters via clang-format and check_format.py.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 clang-format 与 check_format.py 校验 C/C++ 代码格式、文件头（@copyright 必填），并禁用中文字符。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user asks to check code formatting, validate file headers, run clang-format, or verify code quality before submitting or merging.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户要求检查代码格式、校验文件头、运行 clang-format 或在提交/合并前验证代码质量时使用。

summary.en: Automated build–flash–monitor–analyze loop for TuyaOpen devices, with log analysis and error-pattern matching.
summary.zh-CN: TuyaOpen 设备的自动化编译—烧录—监控—分析闭环，含日志分析与错误码识别。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user wants a full automated build–flash–monitor cycle, log analysis, or error-pattern matching on a TuyaOpen device.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户希望执行完整的自动化编译—烧录—监控闭环、分析设备日志或匹配错误模式时使用。

summary.en: Write UUID/AuthKey/PID to TuyaOpen devices — via tuya_config.h (source code) or serial KV flash (UART shell). Obtain authorization codes from platform.tuya.com.
summary.zh-CN: 向 TuyaOpen 设备写入 UUID/AuthKey/PID，支持源码（tuya_config.h）和串口 KV flash（UART shell）两种方式。从 platform.tuya.com 获取授权码。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user mentions device authorization, UUID, AuthKey, PID configuration, network provisioning, device pairing, or cloud connection setup.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户提到设备授权、UUID、AuthKey、PID 配置、网络配网、设备配对或云连接设置时使用。

summary.en: Install dependencies and activate the TuyaOpen development environment via export.sh / export.ps1 / export.bat. Sets OPEN_SDK_ROOT and OPEN_SDK_PYTHON.
summary.zh-CN: 安装依赖并通过 export.sh / export.ps1 / export.bat 激活 TuyaOpen 开发环境，设置 OPEN_SDK_ROOT 和 OPEN_SDK_PYTHON。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user first sets up the TuyaOpen development environment, installs dependencies, or needs to activate the SDK environment. Also use when tos.py is not found or OPEN_SDK_ROOT is not set.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户首次搭建 TuyaOpen 开发环境、安装依赖，或需要激活 SDK 环境时使用。当 tos.py 找不到或 OPEN_SDK_ROOT 未设置时也使用。

summary.en: Single entry point and orchestrator for Tuya Ray panel miniapp development. Covers architecture, dev conventions, upload audit, and dispatches to category- or topic-specific skills (ray-common, smart-ui, charts-library, lamp/socket/robot-vacuum/ipc/electrician-timing/energy-stats, performance-ux-guard, requirement-guide) when deeper detail is needed.
summary.zh-CN: Tuya Ray 面板小程序开发的统一入口与调度器。涵盖架构、开发铁律、上传审核自检，并按需分派到子技能（ray-common、smart-ui、charts-library、灯/插座/扫地机/IPC/电工定时/能耗统计、performance-ux-guard、requirement-guide）。通过本技能即可跑通整条面板开发流水线。

whenToUse.en: Use the moment any panel miniapp work begins — opening a project, reading or writing a DP, picking a category template, designing a page, writing PRD, reviewing code, preparing for upload. From here, dispatch to ray-common / smart-ui / category skill / performance-ux-guard / requirement-guide as the task demands.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 凡涉及面板小程序的开发任务都从本技能进入——打开项目、读写 DP、选品类模板、写 PRD、code review、上传准备一律先走这里，再按需分派到 ray-common / smart-ui / 品类技能 / performance-ux-guard / requirement-guide。

summary.en: Index-first navigation and implementation constraints for Ray miniapp development. Covers Ray APIs, components, framework conventions, lifecycle, routing.
summary.zh-CN: Ray 小程序开发的索引导航与实现约束。覆盖 Ray API、组件、框架约定、生命周期、路由等核心知识。

whenToUse.en: Use for any Ray miniapp UI/page/component work, Ray API integration, device capability binding, lifecycle, routing, image-to-code, i18n, or troubleshooting.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 面板/页面/组件开发、Ray API 与设备能力集成、生命周期与路由、图片转代码、多语言与样式、或排障与升级时使用。

summary.en: Meta-first workflow for generating and modifying pages and components with Ray smart-ui.
summary.zh-CN: 基于 meta-first 工作流，协助 Ray 小程序 smart-ui 的页面与组件生成、改造、表单交互。

whenToUse.en: Use for UI scaffolding, component customization, form/feedback interactions, navigation, image-to-code, or smart-ui troubleshooting / upgrades.
whenToUse.zh-CN: UI 搭建、组件改造、表单与反馈、导航展示、图片转代码、smart-ui 排障升级时使用。

summary.en: Tuya lighting category Ray miniapp panel development — lamp DPs, lamp-* components, hooks, work_mode state machine.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦照明品类 Ray 小程序面板开发，涵盖灯具 DP、lamp-* 组件、hook 选型、work_mode 状态机。

whenToUse.en: Use when building or modifying a lighting panel (bright/temp/colour/scene/music DPs, lamp-* components, useProps/useActions hooks, work_mode FSM).
whenToUse.zh-CN: 创建或修改灯具面板、读写 bright/temp/colour/scene/music 等 DP、使用 lamp-* 组件、选 useProps/useActions hook、设计 work_mode 状态机时使用。

summary.en: Tuya electrician socket / power-strip / smart-switch miniapp panel development.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦电工插座/排插/智能开关面板小程序开发指南。

whenToUse.en: Use to build/modify socket panels — multi-channel switches, countdowns, energy stats DPs, function-page navigation, DP value-mapping rules.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 多路开关渲染、倒计时、用电量统计、功能页跳转、DP 换算规则等场景使用。

summary.en: Tuya sweep robot / robot vacuum panel development — map, DPs, protocol, @ray-js/robot-* SDKs.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦扫地机面板开发：地图、DP、协议、@ray-js/robot-* SDK 全链路。

whenToUse.en: Use for RobotMap component, sweep robot DPs (switch_go, mode, suction, command_trans), room/zone/spot cleaning, virtual walls, raster protocols.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 扫地机地图组件、DP、分区/禁区/虚拟墙、栅格协议编解码等场景使用。

summary.en: Tuya IPC camera panel template (panel-ipc / PublicPanelIpc) — declarative grid, integrated player, VAS banner, PTZ, path cruise.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 IPC 摄像机面板模板，涵盖 FeatureMenu/TabBar 宫格、融合播放器、VAS 运营位、PTZ、路径巡航。

whenToUse.en: Use in panel-ipc / public-ipc-template / tuya-ray-materials PublicPanelIpc — LayoutFeature/Footer, configData, IPCPlayerIntegration, SDM, panel-sdk DP wiring.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 在 panel-ipc 仓库中开发主页宫格/底部 TabBar/弹窗/枚举 DP/PTZ/隐私模式/回放/云存/相册/对讲/品牌色等功能时使用。

summary.en: Integrate @ray/charts-library — scene cards, DataSourceProvider, period controls, chart options helpers.
summary.zh-CN: 在 Ray 小程序中集成 @ray/charts-library：场景卡片、计量数据源、周期控件、图表配置工具。

whenToUse.en: Use when adding electricity/temperature/humidity/illuminance charts to Ray miniapp pages, building period-switching charts, or customizing with withXAxis/withTooltip.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 向 Ray 小程序页面添加用电量/温湿度/照度/计量图表、构建周期切换图表、使用 withXAxis/withTooltip 自定义配置时使用。

summary.en: Integrate @ray-js/electrician-timing-sdk — cloud timer, cycle, random, inching, countdown.
summary.zh-CN: 接入 @ray-js/electrician-timing-sdk：云定时、循环、随机、点动、倒计时五大能力。

whenToUse.en: Use when integrating timing SDK in a Ray miniapp panel — app onLaunch init, changeConfig on device/group switch, ConflictPopup + useDefaultModal, six timer kinds.
whenToUse.zh-CN: Ray 面板小程序接入电工定时 SDK、changeConfig 设备/群组切换、ConflictPopup 联动、六类定时实现时使用。

summary.en: Generate energy / electricity-cost statistics code using @tuya-miniapp/cloud-api — peak-valley pricing, budgets, IndicatorCode.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 @tuya-miniapp/cloud-api 生成电量统计、电费统计、用电成本追踪代码，覆盖峰谷电价、电量/电费预算等场景。

whenToUse.en: Use for electricity statistics, energy billing, cost tracking, peak-valley pricing, budget warnings, getDeviceData, currency settings.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 电量/电费统计、用电成本追踪、峰谷电价、预算提醒、getDeviceData、币种设置等场景使用。

summary.en: Guide for capturing and structuring miniapp product requirements before implementation.
summary.zh-CN: 在动手开发前，规范化捕获并结构化小程序产品需求的指南。

whenToUse.en: Use at project kick-off when scoping a new miniapp — capturing user stories, page flows, DP usage plans.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 项目启动阶段规划新小程序时使用 —— 捕获用户故事、页面流程、DP 使用方案。

summary.en: Performance and UX guardrails for Tuya Ray miniapp panels — rendering, interaction latency, loading states.
summary.zh-CN: Ray 小程序面板的性能与体验红线，覆盖渲染、交互延迟、加载状态等关键指标。

whenToUse.en: Use during code review or optimization to validate panel performance and UX against established guardrails.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 代码评审或性能优化阶段，按既定红线校验面板的性能与体验。
